ops.title: cc-notes built-in packs: 5 codified rows fail on warn-message drift
ops.description: The packs' warn messages were reworded to MCP-tool phrasing (log_add tool / entry param / attach param) but their codified tests= expectations still match the old CLI phrasing ('--attach', 'cc-notes log add'). Fix in the cc-notes repo where the packs are authored. Observed 2026-07-10 running capt-hook test from cc-context.

ops.text: uvx capt-hook --hooks <any consumer hooks dir> test shows 0 failures in nudge_record_evidence/nudge_ephemeral_record_reference/nudge_plan_tasks rows
